2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 33
Date 22 May 2026
Time 19:09
Title Decision - Sprint Qualifying SC2-SC1 Times
Description Decision - Sprint Qualifying SC2-SC1 Times
Enclosed CAN DOC 33 - Sprint Qualifying SC2-SC1 Times.pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 33 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  22 May 2026 
 
        Time  19:09 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Sprint Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars below exceeded the 1:22.0 time limit between the Safety Car lines. 
 
No. Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 6 Isack Hadjar Oracle Red Bull Racing 16:33:54 L2 (SQ1) 
2 5 Gabriel Bortoleto Audi Revolut F1 Team 16:34:08 L3 (SQ1) 
3 81 Oscar Piastri McLaren Mastercard F1 Team 16:34:26 L3 (SQ1) 
4 41 Arvid Lindblad Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team 16:36:38 L5 (SQ1) 
5 27 Nico Hulkenberg Audi Revolut F1 Team 16:37:12 L5 (SQ1) 
6 10 Pierre Gasly BWT Alpine F1 Team 16:37:56
